zh.Roch Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威爾士布洛可爾羅克 卡素
zh.Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威爾士布洛可爾厄普頓 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Deleroche於大約1237年出生在威爾士布洛可爾羅克 卡素時，她的父親William de St Leger93歲，母親Joan de Sackville64歲。她於1254年與Sir Walter Malefant在威爾士布洛可爾厄普頓 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世在威爾士布洛可爾厄普頓 卡素。

zh-hans.Roch Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威尔士布洛可爾羅克 卡素
zh-hans.Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威尔士布洛可爾厄普頓 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Deleroche于大约1237年出生在威尔士布洛可爾羅克 卡素时，她的父亲William de St Leger93岁，母亲Joan de Sackville64岁。她于1254年与Sir Walter Malefant在威尔士布洛可爾厄普頓 卡素结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世在威尔士布洛可爾厄普頓 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Deleroche was born about 1237, in Roch Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, her father, William de St Leger, was 93 and her mother, Joan de Sackville, was 64. She married Sir Walter Malefant in 1254, in Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Deleroche est née environ 1237, à Roch Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, William de St Leger, avait 93 ans et sa mère, Joan de Sackville, avait 64 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Malefant en 1254, à Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée à Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Deleroche um 1237 in Roch Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de St Leger 93 und ihre Mutter Joan de Sackville 64. Sie hat 1254 in Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales Sir Walter Malefant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb in Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Deleroche è nata il circa 1237 nel Roch Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, sua padre, William de St Leger, aveva 93 anni e sua madre, Joan de Sackville, aveva 64 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walter Malefant nel 1254, nel Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Delerocheが約1237年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアロチ カストルで生まれた時，父William de St Legerは93歳，母Joan de Sackvilleは64歳であった。1254年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアウプトン カストルでSir Walter Malefantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女はウェールズペンブロケシュアイアウプトン カストルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Deleroche(이)가 대략 1237년 웨일스 p브로케실르 록h 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de St Leger(은)는 93세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Sackville(은)는 64세였다. 그녀는 1254년 웨일스 p브로케실르 업턴 카스틀에서 Sir Walter Malefant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 웨일스 p브로케실르 업턴 카스틀에서 사망했다.

mg.Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Deleroche nasceu aproximadamente 1237, em Roch Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, William de St Leger, tinha 93 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Sackville, tinha 64 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter Malefant em 1254, em Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Deleroche родилась около 1237 г. в местности роч кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени William de St Leger было 93 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Sackville, 64. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Malefant в 1254 г. в местности уптон кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в местности уптон кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Deleroche nació aproximadamente 1237, en Roch Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, William de St Leger, tenía 93 años y su mamá, Joan de Sackville, tenía 64 años. Se casó con Sir Walter Malefant en 1254, en Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales.
